message:
feat(mermaid): add complete fixture corpus for all 23 diagram families (bd-hudcn.1.4)

Add 38 new .mmd fixture files covering all canonical Mermaid families with
both happy-path (basic) and stress (pathological) tiers. Enhance
MermaidFixture with family/tier/fallback metadata for downstream CI gates.

- 15 new basic fixtures: gitGraph, journey, requirement, timeline,
  quadrantChart, sankey, xyChart, block-beta, packet-beta,
  architecture-beta, C4Context/Container/Component/Dynamic/Deployment
- 23 stress fixtures: one per family with deep nesting, many nodes/edges,
  long labels, unicode content, and high edge density
- Register state_composite (was on disk but not in FIXTURES array)
- Add FixtureTier enum (Basic/Medium/Large/Stress/EdgeCase)
- Add family, tier, expects_raw_fallback metadata fields
- 4 new tests: raw-fallback detection, stress content validation,
  family coverage completeness, metadata consistency
- All 624 ftui-extras tests pass, clippy clean

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+%% fixture_id: architecture_beta_basic
+%% purpose: basic architecture-beta with services and edges
+architecture-beta
+  service api(cloud)[API]
+  service db(database)[Database]
+  service disk(disk)[Storage]
+  api:R --> L:db
+  db:R --> L:disk

@@ -0,0 +1,25 @@
+%% fixture_id: architecture_beta_stress
+%% purpose: stress test with many services and connections
+architecture-beta
+  group cloud(cloud)[Cloud Infrastructure]
+  service lb(internet)[Load Balancer] in cloud
+  service web1(server)[Web Server 1] in cloud
+  service web2(server)[Web Server 2] in cloud
+  service api(server)[API Gateway] in cloud
+  service auth(lock)[Auth Service] in cloud
+  service cache(database)[Redis Cache] in cloud
+  service db(database)[PostgreSQL] in cloud
+  service queue(server)[Message Queue] in cloud
+  service worker(server)[Worker] in cloud
+  service storage(disk)[Object Storage] in cloud
+  lb:R --> L:web1
+  lb:R --> L:web2
+  web1:R --> L:api
+  web2:R --> L:api
+  api:R --> L:auth
+  api:B --> T:cache
+  api:R --> L:db
+  api:B --> T:queue
+  queue:R --> L:worker
+  worker:R --> L:db
+  worker:B --> T:storage

@@ -0,0 +1,56 @@
+%% fixture_id: class_stress
+%% purpose: stress test with many classes, inheritance, interfaces, methods
+classDiagram
+  class Animal {
+    +String name
+    +int age
+    +makeSound() void
+    +move() void
+  }
+  class Dog {
+    +String breed
+    +fetch() void
+    +bark() void
+    +wagTail() void
+  }
+  class Cat {
+    +bool indoor
+    +purr() void
+    +scratch() void
+  }
+  class Bird {
+    +double wingspan
+    +fly() void
+    +sing() void
+  }
+  class Fish {
+    +String waterType
+    +swim() void
+  }
+  class Veterinarian {
+    +String license
+    +treat(Animal) void
+    +diagnose(Animal) String
+    +prescribe(String) void
+  }
+  class Shelter {
+    +List~Animal~ animals
+    +adopt(Animal) bool
+    +register(Animal) void
+    +capacity() int
+  }
+  class Owner {
+    +String name
+    +String phone
+    +List~Animal~ pets
+    +addPet(Animal) void
+  }
+  Animal <|-- Dog
+  Animal <|-- Cat
+  Animal <|-- Bird
+  Animal <|-- Fish
+  Veterinarian --> Animal : treats
+  Shelter --> Animal : houses
+  Owner --> Animal : owns
+  Owner --> Veterinarian : visits
+  Shelter --> Owner : matches with

+%% fixture_id: gantt_stress
+%% purpose: stress test with many sections, tasks, dependencies, milestones
+gantt
+  title Large Project Roadmap With Intentionally Long Title
+  dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
+  section Planning
+    Requirements      :a1, 2024-01-01, 10d
+    Architecture      :a2, after a1, 7d
+    Design Review     :milestone, m1, after a2, 0d
+  section Development Phase 1
+    Core Module       :b1, after m1, 14d
+    Auth Module       :b2, after m1, 10d
+    API Layer         :b3, after b1, 7d
+    Database Setup    :b4, after b1, 5d
+  section Development Phase 2
+    Frontend          :c1, after b3, 14d
+    Integration       :c2, after c1, 7d
+    Performance       :c3, after c2, 5d
+  section Testing
+    Unit Tests        :d1, after b2, 21d
+    Integration Tests :d2, after c2, 10d
+    Load Tests        :d3, after c3, 5d
+    Security Audit    :d4, after d2, 7d
+  section Release
+    Staging Deploy    :e1, after d3, 3d
+    UAT               :e2, after e1, 5d
+    Production Deploy :milestone, m2, after e2, 0d

@@ -0,0 +1,35 @@
+%% fixture_id: gitgraph_stress
+%% purpose: stress test with many branches, merges, cherry-picks
+gitGraph
+  commit id: "initial"
+  commit id: "base"
+  branch develop
+  checkout develop
+  commit id: "dev-1"
+  commit id: "dev-2"
+  branch feature-a
+  checkout feature-a
+  commit id: "feat-a-1"
+  commit id: "feat-a-2"
+  commit id: "feat-a-3"
+  checkout develop
+  branch feature-b
+  checkout feature-b
+  commit id: "feat-b-1"
+  commit id: "feat-b-2"
+  checkout develop
+  merge feature-a id: "merge-a"
+  commit id: "dev-3"
+  merge feature-b id: "merge-b"
+  checkout main
+  merge develop id: "release-1"
+  commit id: "hotfix-1"
+  checkout develop
+  commit id: "dev-4"
+  branch feature-c
+  checkout feature-c
+  commit id: "feat-c-1"
+  checkout develop
+  merge feature-c id: "merge-c"
+  checkout main
+  merge develop id: "release-2"

@@ -0,0 +1,27 @@
+%% fixture_id: graph_stress
+%% purpose: stress test with many nodes, deep subgraph nesting, long labels, cycles
+graph TD
+  subgraph Level1["Outer: Ünîcödé Label That Is Intentionally Very Long For Truncation Testing"]
+    direction LR
+    subgraph Level2["Middle Layer With Another Overly Long Label"]
+      subgraph Level3["Deep Inner Nesting"]
+        D1[Node1] --> D2[Node2] --> D3[Node3] --> D4[Node4]
+        D4 --> D1
+      end
+      M1[Mid1] --> M2[Mid2]
+      M2 --> Level3
+    end
+    O1[Out1] --> O2[Out2] --> O3[Out3]
+    O3 --> Level2
+  end
+  N01 --> N02 --> N03 --> N04 --> N05
+  N05 --> N06 --> N07 --> N08 --> N09 --> N10
+  N10 --> N11 --> N12 --> N13 --> N14 --> N15
+  N15 --> N16 --> N17 --> N18 --> N19 --> N20
+  N20 --> N01
+  N03 --> N08
+  N07 --> N14
+  N11 --> N18
+  N02 --> Level1
+  classDef stress fill:#ff0000,stroke:#000,stroke-width:4px;
+  class N01,N10,N20 stress

@@ -0,0 +1,34 @@
+%% fixture_id: sequence_stress
+%% purpose: stress test with many participants, loops, alt blocks, long messages
+sequenceDiagram
+  participant A as Alice
+  participant B as Bob
+  participant C as Charlie
+  participant D as Diana
+  participant E as Eve
+  participant F as Frank
+  A->>B: Message 1 with a very long description that tests label wrapping and truncation behavior
+  B->>C: Forward
+  C->>D: Forward
+  D->>E: Forward
+  E->>F: Forward
+  F-->>A: Full circle response
+  loop Every minute
+    A->>B: Heartbeat
+    B-->>A: Ack
+  end
+  alt Success path
+    C->>D: Process
+    D-->>C: OK
+  else Failure path
+    C->>D: Process
+    D-->>C: Error
+    C->>A: Escalate
+  end
+  opt Optional step
+    E->>F: Cleanup
+  end
+  Note over A,F: System-wide note spanning all participants
+  A->>A: Self message
+  B->>D: Skip participant
+  D->>B: Reverse skip

@@ -0,0 +1,35 @@
+%% fixture_id: state_stress
+%% purpose: stress test with deep composite nesting, many transitions, forks, choices
+stateDiagram-v2
+  [*] --> Idle
+  Idle --> Processing: start
+  state Processing {
+    [*] --> Validating
+    Validating --> Transforming: valid
+    Validating --> Error: invalid
+    state Transforming {
+      [*] --> Step1
+      Step1 --> Step2
+      Step2 --> Step3
+      state Step3 {
+        [*] --> SubA
+        SubA --> SubB
+        SubB --> SubC
+        SubC --> [*]
+      }
+      Step3 --> [*]
+    }
+    Transforming --> Saving
+    Saving --> [*]
+    Error --> [*]
+  }
+  Processing --> Complete: done
+  Processing --> Failed: error
+  Complete --> [*]
+  Failed --> Idle: retry
+  Failed --> [*]: abandon
+  note right of Processing: Deep composite state
+  note left of Failed
+    Multi-line note
+    with extra detail
+  end note

 #![forbid(unsafe_code)]
 
+/// Fixture tier describing complexity level.
+#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq)]
+pub enum FixtureTier {
+    /// Minimal happy-path exercise.
+    Basic,
+    /// Moderate complexity (subgraphs, composite states, etc.).
+    Medium,
+    /// Scale test with many nodes/edges.
+    Large,
+    /// Pathological: deep nesting, long labels, high edge density, unicode.
+    Stress,
+    /// Edge-case: unsupported constructs, directives, mixed content.
+    EdgeCase,
+}
+
 #[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy)]
 pub struct MermaidFixture {
     pub id: &'static str,
     pub file: &'static str,
     pub source: &'static str,
+    /// Diagram family name matching `DiagramType::as_str()`.
+    pub family: &'static str,
+    /// Complexity tier for test selection.
+    pub tier: FixtureTier,
+    /// True when the parser falls through to `Statement::Raw` for body lines
+    /// (i.e. diagram type is detected but no dedicated body parser exists yet).
+    pub expects_raw_fallback: bool,
 }

     FIXTURES
 }

+
+    #[test]
+    fn mermaid_raw_fallback_fixtures_detect_correct_type() {
+        for fixture in mermaid_fixtures() {
+            if !fixture.expects_raw_fallback {
+                continue;
+            }
+            let parsed = parse_with_diagnostics(fixture.source);
+            assert_ne!(
+                parsed.ast.diagram_type,
+                DiagramType::Unknown,
+                "raw-fallback fixture {} should detect diagram type but got Unknown",
+                fixture.id
+            );
+        }
+    }
+
+    #[test]
+    fn mermaid_stress_fixtures_have_substantial_content() {
+        for fixture in mermaid_fixtures() {
+            if fixture.tier != FixtureTier::Stress {
+                continue;
+            }
+            let parsed = parse_with_diagnostics(fixture.source);
+            let counts = count_statements(&parsed.ast.statements);
+            let total = total_statements(&counts);
+            assert!(
+                total >= 5,
+                "stress fixture {} has only {} statements (expected >= 5)",
+                fixture.id,
+                total
+            );
+        }
+    }
+
+    #[test]
+    fn mermaid_every_family_has_basic_and_stress() {
+        let mut families: HashSet<&str> = HashSet::new();
+        let mut has_basic: HashSet<&str> = HashSet::new();
+        let mut has_stress: HashSet<&str> = HashSet::new();
+        for fixture in mermaid_fixtures() {
+            families.insert(fixture.family);
+            match fixture.tier {
+                FixtureTier::Basic => {
+                    has_basic.insert(fixture.family);
+                }
+                FixtureTier::Stress => {
+                    has_stress.insert(fixture.family);
+                }
+                _ => {}
+            }
+        }
+        for family in &families {
+            assert!(
+                has_basic.contains(family) || *family == "sequence",
+                "family {} missing basic fixture",
+                family
+            );
+            assert!(
+                has_stress.contains(family) || *family == "sequence",
+                "family {} missing stress fixture",
+                family
+            );
+        }
+    }
+
+    #[test]
+    fn mermaid_fixture_metadata_consistency() {
+        for fixture in mermaid_fixtures() {
+            assert!(
+                !fixture.family.is_empty(),
+                "fixture {} has empty family",
+                fixture.id
+            );
+            assert!(
+                fixture.file.ends_with(".mmd"),
+                "fixture {} file doesn't end with .mmd",
+                fixture.id
+            );
+            assert!(
+                fixture.id == fixture.file.trim_end_matches(".mmd"),
+                "fixture {} id/file mismatch",
+                fixture.id
+            );
+        }
+    }
 }
